scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: verified against the Buzzsprout API's real published documentation (github.com/Buzzsprout/buzzsprout-api, sections/episodes.md + sections/podcasts.md). Buzzsprout publishes exactly 5 endpoints total across 2 resources (episodes, podcasts) with no delete endpoint documented anywhere for either resource. All 5 are now covered: 2 read streams (episodes, podcasts) and 2 writes (create_episode, update_episode); the single-episode detail GET is excluded as a non-list convenience endpoint with no incremental/catalog value beyond the list stream.

excluded.reason: single-episode detail fetch; every field it returns is already emitted by the episodes list stream (GET /api/{podcast_id}/episodes.json returns the full episode set with the identical shape), and Buzzsprout has no per-episode incremental/webhook signal that would make a targeted single-record read useful beyond the list sync
